title: SignalFusionEngine / StrategyScreenEngine MarketRegime As-of Gate Validation
disclaimer: research tool only — no auto trading — no precision prediction claim — no DB write — no external API — no LLM call — no strategy mutation — no regime logic mutation — no performance claim — no edge claim

regimeOverridePattern.note: fuseBatch() calls detectRegime(asOf) once and passes result as regimeOverride to all fuseSignals() calls. This is efficient and correct — single gated regime call shared across batch.
